title: Trump gives campaign-style July 4 speech on National Mall for U.S. 250th anniversary
summary: Trump delivered a campaign-style speech at the National Mall during the U.S. 250th anniversary celebration on July 4th, blending patriotic messaging with criticism of perceived ideological threats at home and abroad. The address highlighted his characteristic political rhetoric during the Independence Day commemoration. The speech exemplified ongoing campaign messaging during a national anniversary event.
content: Trump's speech mixed patriotism with attacks on perceived ideological threats at home and abroad.

zh.title: 特朗普在国家广场发表竞选风格的7月4日演讲，纪念美国建国250周年
zh.summary: 特朗普在美国建国250周年庆祝活动期间在国家广场发表竞选风格演讲，将爱国信息与对国内外意识形态威胁的批评相结合。该演讲在独立日纪念活动中凸显了他特有的政治修辞风格。这次演讲体现了在国家纪念活动期间持续进行的竞选宣传。
